payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow molded frame; visible vertical wood grain, matte finish and minor surface wear, no handle visible and the door is mostly fully visible in the crop — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark stained cabinet door","long_description":"Tall, dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow molded frame; visible vertical wood grain, matte finish and minor surface wear, no handle visible and the door is mostly fully visible in the crop — approximately 1.5 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark stained wood","recessed rectangular panel","vertical orientation","narrow molded frame","visible wood grain","matte finish","minor surface wear/scuffs","no handle visible","mostly fully visible in crop"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
